body_txt: A Game Show gimmick that allows home players to play the game, generally played during ratings sweeps periods, and usually by sending in postcards in the 1950s through the 1980s, calling a 900 Number in the 1990s, and going to the show's Web site in the current era. Generally the host will offer an easy first question, with harder questions to come. For a variant which consists of audience-only game play, see Phone-in Game Shows .
